name: Pumpkin Cheese Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375F. Spray a 10-inch tart pan with removable bottom with non-stick spray.
2. Mix crust ingredients in a bowl and press into the prepared pan. Bake for 6 minutes or until set. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese filling ingredients (2 pkg at 8 oz each, vanilla, sugar, flour, egg). Beat until smooth and creamy. Reserve some for topping.
4. Combine pumpkin filling ingredients in a small bowl (canned pumpkin, brown sugar, pumpkin pie spice, milk) and mix well. Add to the remaining cream cheese batter and mix.
5. Spoon into crust and dollop reserved cream cheese mixture over pumpkin filling. Use a table knife to swirl.
6. Bake at 375F for 25-30 minutes or until set. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove sides of pan.
7. For caramel sauce, combine ingredients in a small saucepan and cook over medium heat until boiling. Remove from heat and serve with tart.
Store refrigerated.
